title: Classic Grass
description: Brings back the old grass texture from Minecraft Alpha Classic edition!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8f356b34b18c6b9d300932856e5ae9d4260f82a.png)

# About

Recreates the old grass from old, Alpha Minecraft versions.

- Great for horror modpacks, and normal worlds
- Saturates the same in all locations
- Nostalgic
